InitiateUploadRequest.description:
Initiate-upload request model.

Client hints (``workload_class``, ``policy_hint``, ``checksum_preference``)
are inputs only. The effective persisted transfer policy exposes
``checksum_mode`` as ``none|optional|required`` per SPEC-0002 (S3
integration). ``checksum_preference`` accepts ``none|standard|strict`` as a
client preference; preference is not the same enum as mode mapping and the
final mode decision happens server-side.

checksum_preference.description: Preferred checksum strictness requested by the client.
checksum_preference.title: Checksum Preference

checksum_value.description: Optional checksum value supplied with the initiate request.
checksum_value.title: Checksum Value

content_type.description: Optional MIME type that should be persisted with the object.
content_type.title: Content Type

filename.description: Client-facing filename for the object being uploaded.
filename.title: Filename

policy_hint.description: Optional transfer-policy hint evaluated by the API.
policy_hint.title: Policy Hint

size_bytes.description: Total size of the object being uploaded, in bytes.
size_bytes.title: Size Bytes

workload_class.description: Optional workload-class hint for transfer policy selection.
workload_class.title: Workload Class

InitiateUploadRequest.title: InitiateUploadRequest

bearerAuth.description: Bearer JWT for public Nova file API requests. Scope and tenancy are derived from verified claims.

info.description:
Typed control-plane API for direct-to-S3 uploads, presigned downloads, and durable export workflows.

This API coordinates transfer policy discovery, multipart session state, and export workflow lifecycle metadata. It is not a bulk data-plane proxy; clients transfer object bytes directly with S3 using the returned metadata.
info.title: nova-file-api
